From Stdlib           Require Import List.
From MetaRocq.Common  Require Import BasicAst Kernames Universes.
From MetaRocq.Utils   Require Import bytestring.
From MetaRocq.Erasure Require Import EAst ExAst.
From Agda2Lambox      Require Import CheckWF Eval.
Import ListNotations.

Definition env : global_env :=
  [(((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "length"%bs), true),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tFix
                [{| dname := nNamed "length"%bs;
                    dbody :=
                      tLambda
                        nAnon
                        (tLambda
                           nAnon
                           (tCase
                              ({| inductive_mind :=
                                    (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "List"%bs], "List"%bs);
                                  inductive_ind := 0 |},
                               0)
                              (tRel 0)
                              [([],
                                tConstruct
                                  {| inductive_mind :=
                                       (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                                     inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                  0 []);
                               ([nAnon; nAnon],
                                tApp
                                  (tConstruct
                                     {| inductive_mind :=
                                          (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                                        inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                     1 [])
                                  (tApp (tApp (tRel 4) tBox) (tRel 0)))]));
                    rarg := 0 |}]
                0);
         cst_type :=
           ([nNamed "A"%bs],
            TArr
              TBox
              (TArr
                 (TApp
                    (TApp
                       (TInd
                          {| inductive_mind :=
                               (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "List"%bs], "List"%bs);
                             inductive_ind := 0 |})
                       TBox)
                    (TVar 0))
                 (TInd
                    {| inductive_mind :=
                         (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                       inductive_ind := 0 |}))) |});
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "Eq"%bs), true),
    ConstantDecl {| cst_body := Some tBox; cst_type := ([], TBox) |});
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs; "\931"%bs], "fst"%bs), true),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tLambda
                nAnon
                (tCase
                   ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "\931"%bs);
                       inductive_ind := 0 |},
                    0)
                   (tRel 0) [([nAnon; nAnon], tRel 1)]));
         cst_type :=
           ([nNamed "A"%bs; nNamed "B"%bs],
            TArr
              (TApp
                 (TApp
                    (TInd
                       {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "\931"%bs);
                          inductive_ind := 0 |})
                    (TVar 0))
                 TBox)
              (TVar 0)) |});
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs; "\931"%bs], "snd"%bs), true),
    ConstantDecl {| cst_body := Some tBox; cst_type := ([], TBox) |});
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "Arrow"%bs), true),
    TypeAliasDecl
      (Some
         ([{| tvar_name := nNamed "A"%bs; tvar_is_logical := false;
              tvar_is_arity := true; tvar_is_sort := true |};
           {| tvar_name := nNamed "B"%bs; tvar_is_logical := false;
              tvar_is_arity := true; tvar_is_sort := true |}],
          TArr (TVar 0) (TVar 1))));
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "ListAlias"%bs), true),
    TypeAliasDecl
      (Some
         ([{| tvar_name := nAnon; tvar_is_logical := false;
              tvar_is_arity := true; tvar_is_sort := true |}],
          TApp
            (TApp
               (TInd
                  {| inductive_mind :=
                       (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "List"%bs], "List"%bs);
                     inductive_ind := 0 |})
               TBox)
            (TVar 0))));
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "ListAlias\1366\&27\1366"%bs), true),
    TypeAliasDecl
      (Some
         ([{| tvar_name := nAnon; tvar_is_logical := false;
              tvar_is_arity := true; tvar_is_sort := true |}],
          TApp
            (TApp
               (TInd
                  {| inductive_mind :=
                       (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "List"%bs], "List"%bs);
                     inductive_ind := 0 |})
               TBox)
            (TVar 0))));
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "test"%bs), true),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tApp
                (tApp (tApp (tConst (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "head"%bs)) tBox) tBox)
                (tConst (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "testVec"%bs)));
         cst_type :=
           ([], TApp (TConst (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "Bad"%bs)) TAny) |});
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "head"%bs), true),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tLambda
                nAnon
                (tLambda
                   nAnon
                   (tLambda
                      nAnon
                      (tCase
                         ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "\931"%bs);
                             inductive_ind := 0 |},
                          0)
                         (tRel 0)
                         [([nAnon; nAnon],
                           tCase
                             ({| inductive_mind :=
                                   (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "List"%bs], "List"%bs);
                                 inductive_ind := 0 |},
                              0)
                             (tRel 1)
                             [([],
                               tCase
                                 ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["LamBox"%bs], "Empty"%bs);
                                     inductive_ind := 0 |},
                                  0)
                                 tBox []);
                              ([nAnon; nAnon], tRel 1)])]))));
         cst_type :=
           ([nNamed "A"%bs],
            TArr
              TBox
              (TArr
                 (TInd
                    {| inductive_mind :=
                         (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                       inductive_ind := 0 |})
                 (TArr
                    (TApp
                       (TApp (TConst (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "Vec"%bs)) (TVar 0)) TAny)
                    (TVar 0)))) |});
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "testVec"%bs), true),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tApp
                (tApp
                   (tConstruct
                      {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "\931"%bs);
                         inductive_ind := 0 |}
                      0 [])
                   (tApp
                      (tApp
                         (tConstruct
                            {| inductive_mind :=
                                 (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "List"%bs], "List"%bs);
                               inductive_ind := 0 |}
                            1 [])
                         (tApp
                            (tConstruct
                               {| inductive_mind :=
                                    (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                                  inductive_ind := 0 |}
                               1 [])
                            (tApp
                               (tConstruct
                                  {| inductive_mind :=
                                       (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                                     inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                  1 [])
                               (tApp
                                  (tConstruct
                                     {| inductive_mind :=
                                          (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                                        inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                     1 [])
                                  (tApp
                                     (tConstruct
                                        {| inductive_mind :=
                                             (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                                           inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                        1 [])
                                     (tApp
                                        (tConstruct
                                           {| inductive_mind :=
                                                (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs],
                                                 "Nat"%bs);
                                              inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                           1 [])
                                        (tApp
                                           (tConstruct
                                              {| inductive_mind :=
                                                   (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs],
                                                    "Nat"%bs);
                                                 inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                              1 [])
                                           (tApp
                                              (tConstruct
                                                 {| inductive_mind :=
                                                      (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs],
                                                       "Nat"%bs);
                                                    inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                 1 [])
                                              (tApp
                                                 (tConstruct
                                                    {| inductive_mind :=
                                                         (MPfile
                                                            ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs],
                                                          "Nat"%bs);
                                                       inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                    1 [])
                                                 (tApp
                                                    (tConstruct
                                                       {| inductive_mind :=
                                                            (MPfile
                                                               ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs],
                                                             "Nat"%bs);
                                                          inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                       1 [])
                                                    (tApp
                                                       (tConstruct
                                                          {| inductive_mind :=
                                                               (MPfile
                                                                  ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                   "Nat"%bs],
                                                                "Nat"%bs);
                                                             inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                          1 [])
                                                       (tApp
                                                          (tConstruct
                                                             {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                  (MPfile
                                                                     ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                      "Nat"%bs],
                                                                   "Nat"%bs);
                                                                inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                             1 [])
                                                          (tApp
                                                             (tConstruct
                                                                {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                     (MPfile
                                                                        ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                         "Nat"%bs],
                                                                      "Nat"%bs);
                                                                   inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                                1 [])
                                                             (tApp
                                                                (tConstruct
                                                                   {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                        (MPfile
                                                                           ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                            "Nat"%bs],
                                                                         "Nat"%bs);
                                                                      inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                                   1 [])
                                                                (tApp
                                                                   (tConstruct
                                                                      {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                           (MPfile
                                                                              ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                               "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                               "Nat"%bs],
                                                                            "Nat"%bs);
                                                                         inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                                      1 [])
                                                                   (tApp
                                                                      (tConstruct
                                                                         {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                              (MPfile
                                                                                 ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                  "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                  "Nat"%bs],
                                                                               "Nat"%bs);
                                                                            inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                                         1 [])
                                                                      (tApp
                                                                         (tConstruct
                                                                            {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                 (MPfile
                                                                                    ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                     "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                     "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                  "Nat"%bs);
                                                                               inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                                            1 [])
                                                                         (tApp
                                                                            (tConstruct
                                                                               {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                    (MPfile
                                                                                       ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                        "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                        "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                     "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                  inductive_ind :=
                                                                                    0 |}
                                                                               1 [])
                                                                            (tApp
                                                                               (tConstruct
                                                                                  {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                       (MPfile
                                                                                          ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                           "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                           "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                        "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                     inductive_ind :=
                                                                                       0 |}
                                                                                  1 [])
                                                                               (tApp
                                                                                  (tConstruct
                                                                                     {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                          (MPfile
                                                                                             ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                              "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                              "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                           "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                        inductive_ind :=
                                                                                          0 |}
                                                                                     1 [])
                                                                                  (tApp
                                                                                     (tConstruct
                                                                                        {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                             (MPfile
                                                                                                ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                 "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                 "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                              "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                           inductive_ind :=
                                                                                             0 |}
                                                                                        1 [])
                                                                                     (tApp
                                                                                        (tConstruct
                                                                                           {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                (MPfile
                                                                                                   ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                    "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                    "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                 "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                              inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                0 |}
                                                                                           1 [])

                                                                                           (tConstruct
                                                                                              {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                   (MPfile
                                                                                                      ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                       "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                       "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                    "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                 inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                   0 |}
                                                                                              1 [])
                                                                                           (tApp
                                                                                              (tConstruct
                                                                                                 {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                      (MPfile
                                                                                                         ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                          "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                          "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                       "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                    inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                      0 |}
                                                                                                 1
                                                                                                 [])
                                                                                              (tApp
                                                                                                 (tConstruct
                                                                                                    {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                         (MPfile
                                                                                                            ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                             "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                             "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                          "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                       inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                         0 |}
                                                                                                    1
                                                                                                    [])
                                                                                                 (tApp
                                                                                                    (tConstruct
                                                                                                       {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                            (MPfile
                                                                                                               ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                                "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                                "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                             "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                          inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                            0 |}
                                                                                                       1
                                                                                                       [])

                                                                                                       (tConstruct
                                                                                                          {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                               (MPfile
                                                                                                                  ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                                   "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                                   "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                                "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                             inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                               0 |}
                                                                                                          1
                                                                                                          [])
                                                                                                       (tApp
                                                                                                          (tConstruct
                                                                                                             {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                                  (MPfile
                                                                                                                     ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                                      "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                                      "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                                   "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                  0 |}
                                                                                                             1
                                                                                                             [])
                                                                                                          (tApp
                                                                                                             (tConstruct
                                                                                                                {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                                     (MPfile
                                                                                                                        ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                                         "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                                         "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                                      "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                   inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                     0 |}
                                                                                                                1
                                                                                                                [])
                                                                                                             (tApp
                                                                                                                (tConstruct
                                                                                                                   {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                                        (MPfile
                                                                                                                           ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                                            "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                                            "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                                         "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                      inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                        0 |}
                                                                                                                   1
                                                                                                                   [])

                                                                                                                   (tConstruct
                                                                                                                      {| inductive_mind :=

                                                                                                                            "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                         inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                           0 |}
                                                                                                                      1
                                                                                                                      [])

                                                                                                                      (tConstruct

                                                                                                                                 ["Agda"%bs;

                                                                                                                               "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                            inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                              0 |}
                                                                                                                         1

                                                                                                                      (tApp
                                                                                                                         (tConstruct
                                                                                                                            {| inductive_mind :=

                                                                                                                                  "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                               inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                 0 |}
                                                                                                                            1
                                                                                                                            [])

                                                                                                                               {| inductive_mind :=

                                                                                                                                     "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                                  inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                    0 |}
                                                                                                                               1
                                                                                                                               [])
                                                                                                                            (tApp
                                                                                                                               (tConstruct
                                                                                                                                  {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                                                       (MPfile
                                                                                                                                          ["Agda"%bs;

                                                                                                                                           "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                                                        "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                                     inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                       0 |}
                                                                                                                                  1
                                                                                                                                  [])
                                                                                                                               (tApp
                                                                                                                                  (tConstruct
                                                                                                                                     {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                                                          (MPfile
                                                                                                                                             ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                                                              "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                                                              "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                                                           "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                                        inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                          0 |}
                                                                                                                                     1
                                                                                                                                     [])
                                                                                                                                  (tApp
                                                                                                                                     (tConstruct
                                                                                                                                        {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                                                             (MPfile
                                                                                                                                                ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                                                                 "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                                                                                 "Nat"%bs],
                                                                                                                                              "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                                           inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                             0 |}
                                                                                                                                        1
                                                                                                                                        [])
                                                                                                                                     (tApp
                                                                                                                                        (tConstruct
                                                                                                                                           {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                                                                (MPfile
                                                                                                                                                   ["Agda"%bs;

                                                                                                                                                 "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                                              inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                                0 |}
                                                                                                                                           1

                                                                                                                                                 inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                                   0 |}

                                                                                                                                                       "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                                                    inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                                      0 |}
                                                                                                                                                 1
                                                                                                                                                 [])
                                                                                                                                              (tApp
                                                                                                                                                 (tConstruct
                                                                                                                                                    {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                                                                         (MPfile
                                                                                                                                                            ["Agda"%bs;

                                                                                                                                                          "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                                                       inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                                         0 |}
                                                                                                                                                    1

                                                                                                                                                    (tConstruct
                                                                                                                                                       {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                                                                                                            (MPfile
                                                                                                                                                               ["Agda"%bs;

                                                                                                                                                             "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                                                          inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                                            0 |}
                                                                                                                                                       1

                                                                                                                                                       (tConstruct
                                                                                                                                                          {| inductive_mind :=

                                                                                                                                                                  ["Agda"%bs;

                                                                                                                                                             inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                                               0 |}
                                                                                                                                                          1

                                                                                                                                                          {| inductive_mind :=

                                                                                                                                                                  ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                                                                                                   "Builtin"%bs;

                                                                                                                                                                "Nat"%bs);
                                                                                                                                                             inductive_ind :=
                                                                                                                                                               0 |}
                                                                                                                                                          0
                                                                                                                                                          []))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))
                      (tConstruct
                         {| inductive_mind :=
                              (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "List"%bs], "List"%bs);
                            inductive_ind := 0 |}
                         0 [])))
                tBox);
         cst_type :=
           ([],
            TApp
              (TApp
                 (TConst (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "Vec"%bs))
                 (TInd
                    {| inductive_mind :=
                         (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                       inductive_ind := 0 |}))
              TAny) |});
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "Vec"%bs), true),
    TypeAliasDecl
      (Some
         ([{| tvar_name := nNamed "A"%bs; tvar_is_logical := false;
              tvar_is_arity := true; tvar_is_sort := true |};
           {| tvar_name := nAnon; tvar_is_logical := false;
              tvar_is_arity := false; tvar_is_sort := false |}],
          TApp
            (TApp
               (TConst (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "\931\1366subsyntax"%bs))
               (TApp
                  (TApp
                     (TInd
                        {| inductive_mind :=
                             (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "List"%bs], "List"%bs);
                           inductive_ind := 0 |})
                     TBox)
                  (TVar 0)))
            TBox)));
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "\931\1366subsyntax"%bs), true),
    TypeAliasDecl
      (Some
         ([{| tvar_name := nNamed "A"%bs; tvar_is_logical := false;
              tvar_is_arity := true; tvar_is_sort := true |};
           {| tvar_name := nNamed "B"%bs; tvar_is_logical := true;
              tvar_is_arity := true; tvar_is_sort := false |}],
          TApp
            (TApp
               (TInd
                  {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "\931"%bs);
                     inductive_ind := 0 |})
               (TVar 0))
            TBox)));
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "\931"%bs), true),
    InductiveDecl
      {| ind_finite := Finite; ind_npars := 0;
         ind_bodies :=
           [{| ind_name := "\931"%bs; ind_propositional := false;
               ind_kelim := IntoAny;
               ind_ctors :=
                 [(("\1366_\1366\&2c\1366_"%bs,
                    [(nNamed "fst"%bs, TVar 0); (nNamed "snd"%bs, TBox)]),
                   2)];
               ind_projs := [];
               ind_type_vars :=
                 [{| tvar_name := nNamed "A"%bs; tvar_is_logical := false;
                     tvar_is_arity := true; tvar_is_sort := true |};
                  {| tvar_name := nNamed "B"%bs; tvar_is_logical := true;
                     tvar_is_arity := true; tvar_is_sort := false |}] |}] |});
   (((MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "List"%bs], "List"%bs), true),
    InductiveDecl
      {| ind_finite := Finite; ind_npars := 0;
         ind_bodies :=
           [{| ind_name := "List"%bs; ind_propositional := false;
               ind_kelim := IntoAny;
               ind_ctors :=
                 [(("\1366\&5b\1366\1366\&5d\1366"%bs, []), 0);
                  (("\1366_\1366cons_"%bs,
                    [(nNamed "x"%bs, TVar 1);
                     (nNamed "xs"%bs,
                      TApp
                        (TApp
                           (TInd
                              {| inductive_mind :=
                                   (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "List"%bs], "List"%bs);
                                 inductive_ind := 0 |})
                           TBox)
                        (TVar 1))]),
                   2)];
               ind_projs := [];
               ind_type_vars :=
                 [{| tvar_name := nNamed "a"%bs; tvar_is_logical := true;
                     tvar_is_arity := false; tvar_is_sort := false |};
                  {| tvar_name := nNamed "A"%bs; tvar_is_logical := false;
                     tvar_is_arity := true; tvar_is_sort := true |}] |}] |});
   (((MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs), true),
    InductiveDecl
      {| ind_finite := Finite; ind_npars := 0;
         ind_bodies :=
           [{| ind_name := "Nat"%bs; ind_propositional := false;
               ind_kelim := IntoAny;
               ind_ctors :=
                 [(("zero"%bs, []), 0);
                  (("suc"%bs,
                    [(nNamed "n"%bs,
                      TInd
                        {| inductive_mind :=
                             (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                           inductive_ind := 0 |})]),
                   1)];
               ind_projs := []; ind_type_vars := [] |}] |});
   (((MPfile ["Scheme"%bs], "Bad"%bs), true),
    TypeAliasDecl (Some ([], TAny)));
   (((MPfile ["LamBox"%bs], "Empty"%bs), true),
    InductiveDecl
      {| ind_finite := Finite; ind_npars := 0;
         ind_bodies :=
           [{| ind_name := "Empty"%bs; ind_propositional := false;
               ind_kelim := IntoAny; ind_ctors := []; ind_projs := [];
               ind_type_vars := [] |}] |})].
